segments.text: The Mighty One, God the Lord, Has spoken and called the earth From the rising of the sun to its going down.
Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God will shine forth.
Our God shall come, and shall not keep silent; A fire shall devour before Him, And it shall be very tempestuous all around Him.
He shall call to the heavens from above, And to the earth, that He may judge His people:
Gather My saints together to Me, Those who have made a covenant with Me by sacrifice.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Let the heavens declare His righteousness, For God Himself is Judge. Selah
Hear, O My people, and I will speak, O Israel, and I will testify against you; I am God, your God!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will not rebuke you for your sacrifices Or your burnt offerings, Which are continually before Me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will not take a bull from your house, Nor goats out of your folds.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For every beast of the forest is Mine, And the cattle on a thousand hills.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I know all the birds of the mountains, And the wild beasts of the field are Mine.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If I were hungry, I would not tell you; For the world is Mine, and all its fullness.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Will I eat the flesh of bulls, Or drink the blood of goats?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Offer to God thanksgiving, And pay your vows to the Most High.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Call upon Me in the day of trouble; I will deliver you, and you shall glorify Me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: What right have you to declare My statutes, Or take My covenant in your mouth,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Seeing you hate instruction And cast My words behind you?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When you saw a thief, you consented with him, And have been a partaker with adulterers.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You give your mouth to evil, And your tongue frames deceit.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You sit and speak against your brother; You slander your own mother's son.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: These things you have done, and I kept silent; You thought that I was altogether like you; But I will rebuke you, And set them in order before your eyes.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Now consider this, you who forget God, Lest I tear you in pieces, And there be none to deliver:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Whoever offers praise glorifies Me; And to him who orders his conduct aright I will show the salvation of God.
segments.speaker: God
